title: Repo skeleton (TS/ESM/pnpm) + CI with provenance-coverage & license-status gates
context: The project needs a TS/ESM/pnpm workspace repo that enforces the binding guardrails in CI from day one, before any data or content is produced. The CI gates are not optional niceties: a green build must mean provenance-coverage = 100%, license-status passing, schema-valid output, and reproducible-from-snapshots. These gates are defined in the guardrail spec (task 001) and must be wired here so later tasks build on a credible foundation. No beneficiary or expert reviewers are yet secured.
objective: Stand up the TS/ESM/pnpm monorepo skeleton with a CI pipeline that enforces the project's binding build-breakers: 100% provenance coverage, license-status gate, schema validity, reproducible-from-snapshots, small-cell guard, and helpline-verification gate. The skeleton must be runnable locally and in CI with no data yet present, and must pass a clean build with the gate scaffolding in place.
acceptanceCriteria: TS/ESM/pnpm workspace initialised with packages for pipeline, schema, and explainers; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes on a clean checkout
CI (GitHub Actions or equivalent) is wired and runs on push/PR; build is reproducible from cached source snapshots
Provenance-coverage gate implemented as a build-breaker: any dataset value or chart artifact lacking a resolvable source ref fails the build with a clear error
License-status gate implemented: any series whose source lacks a recorded accepted/cleared license entry fails the build
Schema-validity gate: output dataset validates against the canonical JSON Schema (stub schema acceptable until task 004 lands); invalid output fails the build
Small-cell guard scaffolded: any published cell below the configured suppression threshold fails the build
Helpline-verification gate scaffolded: any support/helpline pointer lacking a dated verification record fails the build
README references PLAN.md, TASKS.md, and CLAUDE.md; repo contains no secrets, tokens, or API keys; MIT licence file committed
output: A merged PR adding the TS/ESM/pnpm monorepo skeleton with CI wired to enforce the six binding build-breakers (provenance-coverage, license-status, schema-validity, reproducible-from-snapshots, small-cell guard, helpline-verification gate); pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green.
